for_pm_times_after_noon_subtract_12_fr: For PM times after noon, subtract 12 from the hour.
for_am_times_the_hour_stays_the_same: For AM times, the hour stays the same.
move_one_representation_and_watch_anal: Move one representation and watch analog, 12-hour, and 24-hour time stay linked.
break_an_interval_into_friendly_jumps_: Break an interval into friendly jumps to the hour, then combine the jumps.
the_interval_is_zero_so_start_and_end_: The interval is zero, so start and end are the same.
use_12_hour_form_with_am_or_pm: Use 12-hour form with AM or PM.
enter_a_time_such_as_13_25_or_1_25_pm: Enter a time such as 13:25 or 1:25 PM.
enter_minutes_or_a_duration_such_as_1_: Enter minutes or a duration such as 1 h 15 m.
not_yet_draw_jumps_between_the_two_tim: Not yet. Draw jumps between the two times and try again.
compare_event_lengths_free_time_gaps_a: Compare event lengths, free-time gaps, and the span of an entire plan.
mark_both_times_on_a_number_line_jump_: Mark both times on a number line. Jump to a friendly hour, add whole hours, then finish the remaining minutes.
enter_a_time_such_as_18_40_or_6_40_pm: Enter a time such as 18:40 or 6:40 PM.
enter_minutes_or_a_duration_such_as_2_: Enter minutes or a duration such as 2 h 15 m.
not_yet_use_a_clock_timeline_or_minute: Not yet. Use a clock, timeline, or minutes after midnight.
retry_set_complete_returning_to_all_ch: Retry set complete. Returning to all challenges.
a_stable_deterministic_practice_set_wi: A stable, deterministic practice set with difficulty bands and a focused retry-missed queue.
durations_may_be_entered_in_total_minu: Durations may be entered in total minutes or hours and minutes.
you_may_use_either_12_hour_or_24_hour_: You may use either 12-hour or 24-hour time.
draw_jumps_to_a_friendly_hour: Draw jumps to a friendly hour.
convert_each_time_to_minutes_after_mid: Convert each time to minutes after midnight.
for_a_missing_start_count_backward_fro: For a missing start, count backward from the end.
crossing_midnight_begins_a_new_24_hour: Crossing midnight begins a new 24-hour cycle.
see_time_count_time_plan_time_and_expl: See time, count time, plan time, and explain your strategy.
a_clock_time_and_an_amount_of_time_are: A clock time and an amount of time are different quantities. Write units with durations.
no_timer_pressure_keyboard_friendly_te: No timer pressure · keyboard friendly · text alternatives included
